title: cicercula sativa var. colorata
intro: Cicercula sativa var. colorata, also known as the yellow gentian, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae), characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and rheumatism, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cicercula sativa var. colorata include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
